text: PG Certification in Forward Deployed Engineering (FDE) — IIT Roorkee.
title: Forward Deployed Engineering (FDE)
description: Postgraduate certification program focused on forward deployed engineering — bridging product development with customer-facing technical problem solving.
highlights: Learning to deploy and integrate solutions directly with enterprise customers.
Building skills in rapid prototyping, system design, and cross-functional delivery.

text: Skillsoft's Bash Scripting (Track 2) — automating common tasks with bash.
title: Bash Scripting (Track 2)
description: Track 2 certification covering bash scripting for automating common system administration and development tasks.
highlights: Automating file operations, process management, and shell workflows.
Writing reusable scripts for CI/CD and local development tooling.

text: Google's Foundations of Project Management — Agile & risk analysis.
title: Foundations of Project Management
description: Google Career Certificate covering project management fundamentals, Agile methodologies, and risk analysis.
highlights: Agile and Scrum frameworks for iterative delivery.
Risk identification, stakeholder communication, and project planning.
